mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reports (reporter_id, target_type, target_id, reason) VALUES (#{reporterId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{reason})
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.nickname AS reporter_nickname FROM reports r JOIN users u ON r.reporter_id = u.id ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
SELECT r.*, u.nickname AS reporter_nickname FROM reports r JOIN users u ON r.reporter_id = u.id WHERE r.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
SELECT r.*, u.nickname AS reporter_nickname FROM reports r JOIN users u ON r.reporter_id = u.id WHERE r.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE reports SET status = #{status}, admin_note = #{adminNote}, processed_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
